articles.title: Apple to produce Made in America wireless chips with Broadcom
articles.description: Apple has signed a $30 billion+ multiyear deal with Broadcom to design and produce more than 15 billion U.S.-made custom wireless connectivity chips for Apple products.

articles.title: Dinari, tZERO join forces on turnkey platform for tokenized U.S. equities
articles.description: The move comes as firms race to build the infrastructure for blockchain-based stocks and debate how tokenized stocks should work.

articles.title: 太空牛仔出任務，老舊衛星「雨燕天文台」將實施在軌延壽首例
articles.description: 美國國家航空暨太空總署（NASA）近日展開一場罕見的太空救援行動。一艘由民間商業太空公司 Katalyst S […]

articles.title: Adam Back's BSTR scraps SPAC merger, seeks new deal
articles.description: BSTR and Cantor Equity Partners will not complete their merger under the original July 2025 agreement, with the shareholder postponed indefinitely.

articles.title: Venus Aerospace raises $90M Series B to build a new kind of rocket engine
articles.description: Build a new kind of rocket engine, and the world will beat a path to your door.

articles.title: Blue Origin reportedly raising $10B at $130B valuation
articles.description: Blue Origin is raising $10 billion at a $130 billion pre-money valuation from Coatue Asset Management, Bezos himself and other big-name investors, the New York Times reported.

articles.title: BNB Chain is building a new layer-1 for high-frequency trading and AI agents
articles.description: The network aims to process over 100,000 transactions per second by streaming them directly, eliminating public queues to make trades faster and more secure.

articles.title: Bull Bitcoin asks French court to strike down DAC8 implementing decree
articles.description: The non-custodial Bitcoin exchange petitioned to annul a French decree implementing DAC8, arguing the rules could create surveillance and physical risks for up to 135 million European crypto holders.

articles.title: India crypto tax filings lag trading activity: Report
articles.description: India’s tax department reportedly found that fewer than a quarter of the 645,000 people who made crypto transactions reported them on tax returns.

articles.title: The 5 types of real world assets being tokenized fastest onchain
articles.description: Tokenized Real World Assets span treasuries, real estate, stocks, commodities and private credit. The sector is still small in TradFi terms but it's growing very, very fast.

articles.title: Kazakhstan president signs decree to accelerate crypto adoption
articles.description: Kazakhstan targets gas-powered electricity for mining, income tax exemptions for regulated crypto transactions and cross-border stablecoin payments in a new decree signed by the president.

articles.title: Venus Williams-backed WeWard can now lock your apps until you hit your steps
articles.description: With funding from tennis star and angel investor Venus Williams, the French app WeWard says that it increases walking time by almost 25%.

articles.title: BTC speculators in focus as analysis says 'textbook Bitcoin bottom' is underway
articles.description: Analysis flagged a Bitcoin moving average derivative that last triggered at the end of the 2022 bear market as BTC price action returned to its reversal zone.

articles.title: Citadel drops U.S. Portofino suit, seeks bankruptcy order against firm's founder in UK
articles.description: After winning a 6 million-pound London arbitration award, Citadel dropped its U.S. trade secrets case, saying another judgment would likely go uncollected.

articles.title: SpaceX's first bitcoin wallet movements in six months likely don't signal sales
articles.description: Onchain trackers found the newly public company shifted a tiny amount of bitcoin between its own addresses. Nothing reached an exchange.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: 維護公司信用及股東權益，威盛董事會決議第五次買回庫藏股
articles.description: 威盛電子重訊公告表示，為維護公司信用及股東權益，經董事會決議將實施第五次買回庫藏股計畫。公司預計自民國115年 […]

articles.title: Lyn Alden says Bitcoin needs no savior as Strategy sells $216M of BTC
articles.description: Bitcoin-focused macroeconomist Lyn Alden said BTC must stand on its own as Strategy sold 3,588 BTC, while warning about leverage risks tied to STRC.

articles.title: Former OpenAI exec Kevin Weil is now on the board of Stoke Space
articles.description: Kevin Weil's new role at Stoke Space suggests reusable rockets are the next hot thing in Silicon Valley.
